'''Barthis''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and the father of [[Elsen Barthis]].

==Biography==
He worked with [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]] for a year during her time in the [[Corellian Security Force]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1stm}}
